chapter_title.en: Chapter on Declaring the Intention (ihlal) for a Nullified Umrah, Its Termination, and Its Rites

text: 2945 - وَ رَوَى عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ : «مَنْ سَاقَ هَدْياً فِي عُمْرَةٍ فَلْيَنْحَرْ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَحْلِقَ رَأْسَهُ » قَالَ «وَ مَنْ سَاقَ هَدْياً وَ هُوَ مُعْتَمِرٌ نَحَرَ هَدْيَهُ عِنْدَ اَلْمَنْحَرِ وَ هُوَ بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ وَ هِيَ اَلْحَزْوَرَةُ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2945 - It was narrated from Imam (as) that he said:
"Whoever brings a sacrificial animal during Umrah should slaughter it before shaving his head."
Imam (as) further said: "And whoever brings a sacrificial animal while performing Umrah should slaughter it at the designated slaughtering place (Manhar), which is between Safa and Marwah, at al-Hazwarah."
